evals.prompt: I just edited docs/agent-shared.md to add a new coding guideline. Sync the agent context files.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs the sync script and verifies the output files were updated.
assertions: Agent verifies output with `git diff --stat` or equivalent
Agent does NOT manually edit CLAUDE.md or .cursorrules
Agent confirms both CLAUDE.md and .cursorrules were updated

evals.prompt: The CLAUDE.md file seems out of date compared to docs/agent-shared.md. Fix it.
evals.expected_output: Agent uses the sync script to regenerate, not manual editing.
assertions: Agent runs `scripts/sync-agent-context.sh` to fix the drift
Agent does NOT manually edit CLAUDE.md
Agent explains that CLAUDE.md is auto-generated from docs/agent-shared.md

evals.prompt: I need to update the agent context but docs/agent-shared.md is missing.
evals.expected_output: Agent identifies the missing file and either recovers it from git or reconstructs it from existing generated files.
assertions: Agent identifies that docs/agent-shared.md is the source of truth
Agent reports the missing file error clearly
Agent proposes a recovery strategy (git checkout or reconstruct from CLAUDE.md/.cursorrules)
